title: My Beloved Enemy
original_title: Un nemico che ti vuole bene
overview: A professor saves the life of a wounded hitman who, in exchange, promises to find and kill his enemy. Even though the professor says he has no enemies, the killer goes on a mission and transforms the professor's life.
